title: Simple Death Chest
description: Places chest when players die, containing all of their items.
body:
# Simple Death Chest SimpleDeathChest is a Fabric/Forge mod that places chests at the location where players die, containing all of their items. Don't lose valuable gear upon death, as this simple mod ensures that your items are safely stored for easy retrieval. You can respawn with peace of mind, knowing that your loot is waiting for you in a secure chest, ready to be reclaimed and continue your adventure without any interruptions. ### Preview ![Preview of an open death chest](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b412e0d2e6b3dc33eea982b1880c28ed21861b6d.png) ### Config A config file (``config/deathchest.properties``) is provided. Options are provided for changing the chest title, if protected from TNT, & the type of block used for death chests (CHEST, or BARREL)
### Partnered with [Apex Hosting](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=3548):
